description:
Think carefully about the letters you choose in this word game, because before you know it, the hangman will be colored in. With Galgje Junior, you can start searching for the hidden word right away, because you don't have to come up with it yourself! The letter master can choose one of the words that are tailored to the children's level. Galgje Junior is an exciting game that tests children's vocabulary!

—description from the publisher (translated)
family: Versions & Editions: Junior Versions of Grown-Up Games

description:
Six of the best superheroes compete in a tournament to be the best in the world.

They will have to pass three tests for a board: one of speed and cunning, another of combat against other superheroes and supervillains, and finally, in the third, they will battle each other to choose a Champion.

Players receive combat and aid cards that they will use in combat.

The goal of the game is to get from the first card to the last card. Interestingly enough, the players don't throw a dice, but try to remember the way. Therefore, the player has 5 seconds to look at the cards and then has to memorize the way. 
The player who is the first one on the last card wins the game.

This is a taking game for children to learn to multiply. On every card, there is a calculation task with a sweet octopus with bubbles in his arms. 
The game is played as every trick taking game with the slight difference that the children have to multiply first to know their number. The child with the highest number takes all the cards. The winner of the game is the child who took the moast cards.

The Front is a fast-paced, strategic World War II card game where 2-5 players command iconic units across historic battlefields. Deploy troops, tanks, ships, and planes with unique effects, bluff your way through hidden plays, and outmaneuver your enemies to dominate the war front.

—description from the publisher

The game contains 20 cards with animals. All the children are hiding the cards except one card somewhere in the room. Then the children start with the remaining card and search for the animal on that card. The child who finds the animal first gets the card. The child who has most of the cards at the end wins the game.

The Malice of Light Adventures is a cooperative roguelike boss-battler based on Brady J. Sadler’s epic fantasy book series, The Malice of Light. Designed for 1–4 players, the game combines modular gameplay, quick character progression, and elegant combat in a fast-paced, replayable format inspired by the Sadlers’ previous titles like Heroes of Terrinoth and Street Masters.

Players will battle dangerous foes in iconic locations from the books while contending with escalating villain schemes across multiple acts, culminating in a dramatic boss encounter. The game also serves as a great entry point for those new to The Malice of Light, offering a unique way to explore its vibrant world of classic high fantasy—separate from the story told in the novels.

—description from the publisher

One player thinks of a word and places it face down with the cards in the box. He reveals one letter after the other, while the other players try to guess the word. The one who guesses the word first wins the game.

The children are searching for pony Peppermint. Therefore, the players take turns in rolling the dice and running on the game board to find it on the hiding cards. If a player finds the pony, s/he has to move it to the meadow. The other players try to prevent that of course and catch the token before.
The player who manages to get with the pony to the meadow as the first one wins the game.

boardgame: Was ist was: Das grosse Quiz
description:
A quiz game with 1,800 questions from 5 different categories. 
The quizmaster picks a question and the participants simultaneously use their discs to give their respective answers. The first player with 10 correct answers wins. 
There are two difficulty levels, so that adults can play with younger participants at the same time.

Players build and control multiple food chains. A turn consists of a player placing 1 card on either the play pile or on a savannah. There are several action cards that vary the course of the game. 
Players that control a food chain score points. The first player to reach 600/900/1200 (4/3/2 players) points total wins the game

boardgame: Black Rose Wars: Revised Edition – Codex Tenebrae
description:
Inquisitor Ezechiele is investigating several individuals suspected of involvement in the heresy spreading across Europe. Follow his steps through the pages of his personal journal.

This exclusive expansion adds new events, missions, and alternative summons focused on Inquisitor Ezechiele’s discoveries about the Black Rose Lodge.

A quiz in the form of a fan, on different subjects, 1000 questions and answers sequenced by subjects: Girls & boys, animals, nature & environment, music, jokes. The cards are held by a screw and can be ideally taken on travels, the answers are always on the next page.
The player who answers most of the questions correctly wins.

Promo containing the following components: 
1 Dice Tower
4 Battery tiles

Dice Tower
You may use the Dice Tower to roll the dice during the Preparation phase of each round and when activating promo Battery tiles.

Batteries
During setup leave the core game Battery tiles in the box. Each player takes a promo Battery tile instead. All regular rules apply to the promo Battery tiles. The new effect present on the promo Battery tile works as follows:
Take all currently exhausted dice from your Player board and retail them (using the Dice Tower). Gain 1 unrefined Metal from each die, same as you would when drafting them. Then, place the dice back on the exhausted spaces of your Player board.

Choose from five games that will put your tongue to the test. Challenge your fellow Wizards to great duels of Spell-slinging, tongue-twisting acrobatics. Team up to save your town from the evil, tyrannical warlock, Ranlok the Prideful.
Astound onlookers with your Flubless performance as you leave them jaw dropped and tongue tied.

In Word Whizzes you are casting spells in a grand tournament. The spells are tongue twisters, of course.

Word Whizzes is a family friendly, speech therapy/party game.

A free PnP expansion that was created during the COVID-19 period so that people could have something new to try.

The expansion consists of six "Ternion" cards.

Play "Cosmic Run: Regeneration" as normal, but with these changes:

Place the 6 Ternion cards face-up near the board.
At the start of your turn, take 1 face-up Ternion card and place it in front of you.
During your turn, you may place matching dice on the chosen Ternion card.
You are not required to place any dice on the Ternion card.
If you place the 3 required dice on a Ternion card by the end of your turn, use the card's power.
After use, flip the card face-down and return it to the supply, unless there are 2 or fewer face-up Ternion cards. In this case, return it face-up.
If you do not place all the required dice, return the card face-up to the supply.
If a planet matching a Ternion card is discovered or destroyed, remove the card from the game.

It's opening night at Bella Morte's new Italian restaurant. The sauces are simmering, the cheeses are chilling, and murder is on the menu...

Before anyone can say "Mamma Mia!", rival restaurant owner Karl Ickbread is found dead in the pantry - sliced up with a pizza wheel. But whodunit? Invite your friends and family to solve this delicious mystery where everyone's a suspect!

Four crew cards that grant free actions for subsequent reactor/thruster/shield/damage cards played that turn.

    ATTENTION!! These special cards will not be sold! They are a gift that comes with other PaperGames games, or distributed through stores, events, and specific campaigns. Look for yours!

boardgame: Taco Gato Cabra Queijo Pizza: FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Edition – Taça (2)
description:
Taco! Gato! Cabra! Queijo! Pizza! TAÇA!

Você que já guardou estas 5 palavras malucas na cabeça agora tem um novo desafio: jogar com uma nova carta especial: a Taça! Essa carta adiciona um novo gesto no jogo e treina você para a vitória!

A Taça vai deixar suas partidas ainda mais difíceis, já que quando ela aparecer você terá que fazer um novo gesto, “levantando a Taça” com ambos os braços e batendo nas cartas, logo em seguida (conforme as regras originais).

Numeradas de 1 a 5, com cores diferentes, essas cartas são distribuídas separadamente. Colecione todas elas!


     ATENÇÃO!! Estas cartas especiais não serão vendidas!! Ela são um presente que acompanham outros jogos das PaperGames, ou distribuídas via lojas, em eventos e em campanhas específicas. Procure as suas!


Taco! Cat! Goat! Cheese! Pizza! CUP!

If you've already memorized these 5 crazy words, you now have a new challenge: playing with a new special card: the Cup! This card adds a new gesture to the game and trains you for victory!

The Cup will make your matches even more challenging, as when it appears, you'll have to perform a new gesture, "raising the Cup" with both arms and then immediately tapping the cards (according to the original rules).

Numbered 1 to 5 and colored differently, these cards are distributed separately. Collect them all!


    ATTENTION!! These special cards will not be sold! They are a gift that comes with other PaperGames games, or distributed through stores, events, and specific campaigns. Look for yours!

The Jackpot: Set the Reel – Expansions includes three mini expansions, each replacing the 7s in the base game with a unique mini-game that is inspired by the bonus rounds found in real slot machines.

First, set sail with the 7 Seas expansion. When you score this jackpot, you’ll draw three movement cards and play each one individually. As your ship sails across the seas, you’ll collect bonuses at the end of each movement. If another player’s ship is in your path, you’ll leap over it, continuing your voyage and getting closer to the bigger prizes.

Next, raid the tomb with the Raiders of the Last Tomb expansion. In this temple escape, you must predict whether each new card in the temple run is higher or lower than the previous one. Correct guesses move both the adventurer and the pursuing boulder one space forward. Incorrect guesses cause the boulder to move two spaces instead. The mini-game ends when the adventurer either escapes or is caught. At the end, you'll collect all the rewards shown on the revealed temple cards.

Finally, test your luck with the Lucky Clovers expansion. After triggering this jackpot, roll three dice up to three times, locking in any results you wish to keep. Based on your final roll, you’ll earn rewards such as coins, bonus tokens, and goal cards. It’s a second shot at striking it big!

—description from the publisher

In 18CTN, 3-5 tycoons compete to earn money and build the best stock portfolio by investing in and operating companies that develop and exploit a fictional island.

18CTN is an expansion/extension for a popular game. It adds an 18xx style stock & investment system, featuring the 4 player colors as major companies. It also adds a commodity value system that interacts with the 5th major company (robber) and the minor companies (ports).

—description from the publisher

Six realms inhabited by diverse magical beings (angels, elves, centaurs, mermaids, harpies and demons) are fighting for control over the fictional land of ZAVAT. Each player chooses one such being to play as his or her character throughout the game. The various characters have different special abilities and can be upgraded during the game in order to unlock them.

The game includes six card decks representing six classical elements. Each deck includes cards that gives other types of benefits. Players start the game with one card from each deck in their hand and may draw a card of their choice each turn. Cards can be allies, objects or spells.

A player's turn begins with the roll of an element-symbol-dice which determines if they and their opponents will earn energy for cards they placed on their boards (including the starting characters). during their turns, players may use energy to place cards of their boards in order to upgrade their characters, to strengthen them, and to raise the possibility of gaining energy in future turns. At the end of a turn a player may declare an attack on another character and try to decrease its limited number of lives. To win, eliminate all other players.

Discover the new edition of the game! Alone or in a team, conquer the Fort! Complete the challenges to collect keys and clues!

Fort Boyard is a family action game!

The gameplay remains identical to the original, but the puzzles, code words, duels, and challenges have been updated.

Speed, thinking, concentration, courage, and above all, teamwork will be required to win the game.

Physical or Logical Challenge:
Or perhaps you prefer Father Fouras's puzzles? Either way, you'll have to overcome the challenges to collect the keys and clues that will allow you to decipher your Code Word.

A board game for the whole family
The Fort Boyard board game is suitable for everyone. Parents, children, and grandparents will share a fun and playful moment together. Who among you will be the most flexible?

A new version with even more challenges
Father Fouras still has a few puzzles in his spellbook. You'll be able to solve more than 50 puzzles in this game, with a child/adult distinction for a better gaming experience.

—description from the publisher (translated)

Découvrez la nouvelle édition du jeu ! Seul ou en équipe, partez à la conquête du Fort ! Réussissez les épreuves pour collecter les clés et les indices !

Fort Boyard est un jeu d'action familial !

La mécanique reste identique à l'originale mais les énigmes, les mots codes, les duels et les épreuves ont été renouvelé.

Rapidité, réflexion, concentration, courage, mais surtout esprit d'équipe seront nécessaire pour remporter la partie.

Epreuve physique ou de logique:
Ou peut-être que vous préférez les énigmes du Père Fouras ? Dans tous les cas, vous devrez relever les challenges pour récolter les clés et les indices qui vous permettront de déchiffrer votre Mot Code.

Un jeu de société pour toute la famille
Le jeu de plateau Fort Boyard est adapté à tous. Parents, enfants et grands-parents partageront ensemble un moment fun et ludique. Qui d’entre vous sera le plus souple ?

Une nouvelle version avec encore plus d’épreuve
Le Père Fouras a encore quelques énigmes dans son grimoire, vous pourrez répondre à plus de 50 énigmes sont à résoudre dans ce jeu avec une distinction enfant/adulte pour une meilleure expérience de jeu.

—description from the publisher

Asteriated Adventure: Duel is back! There are 4 unique characters and 1 powerful BOSS in Season 2. Get to try something new!

Crimson Battlesoul - Take advantage of the extra cards Bloody Eyes to eliminate your opponent.
Puppeteer - Manipulate the Mecha and Parasitic Beast to control the duel.
Sage and Elementalist - Former friends, now enemies. Tomes VS Elemental magic, which could get the victory?

BOSS Magister - Powerful and mysterious opponent. Try to find her weakness!

—description from the publisher

Asteriated Adventure: Duel is back! There are 4 unique characters in Season 3. Let's duel with these new characters!

To be revealed...

Snowp is a fast-paced dexterity and set-collection game where players flick metal rings across a snowy board to capture colorful bells.

On your turn, place your ring on your starting arc, aim, and flick! Any bells that land inside your ring are yours to keep. Collect multiples of the same color for higher scores, but beware — the color left on the board at the end of the round is worth nothing. Clever timing and accurate shots are key to snatching high-value sets and triggering the Color Clear Bonus by removing the last bell of a color.

Play lasts over three rounds, with players carrying over a limited number of bells between rounds. At the end, the player (or team) with the highest total score wins.

With its mix of precision flicking, tactical collection, and unpredictable rebounds, Snowp delivers a refreshing, winter-themed competition that keeps kids and adults alike hooked until the very last shot.

—description from the publisher

Pakiaka is a fun and educational word game in te reo Māori which encourages players to challenge and improve their Māori vocab knowledge. Pakiaka is a game of speed - the aim is to finish your crossword grid first, but accuracy is just as important to ensure you get as many points as possible. There are extra challenges available, as well as play variations, to give players options depending on what type of game is desired. Pakiaka is a great whānau game where adults and tamariki can play together.

—description from the publisher

Stack the colored blocks into a stable tower to win this chaotic game of skill. Sounds simple, right? Don't get too excited, because various handicaps will try to drive you crazy! For example, can you work as a T-rex or an elephant? And what if the blocks literally fall out of the sky? The only things you can rely on are your own hands and the instructions on the cards. Can you build the towers the fastest without letting them fall?

—description from the publisher (translated)

Take on the tiny hand eating challenge with Marshmallow Madness! Grab a bag of mini marshmallows and your favorite people and get wild! Start the timer and race to see how many marshmallows you can grab with the itty-bitty hands and get into your mouth! In this race to stuff your face, the player who can eat the most mini marshmallows in 60 seconds is the winner!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Battle of the Cyborgs: A Solitaire Sci-Fi Wargame
description:
A Solitaire Sci-Fi wargame.

By the end of the twenty first century the Earth was heading for destruction. Over worked, over populated and dying, it could no longer provide for the masses who relied upon its resources. Gradually, people needed machines and AI to survive. It became commonplace to have mechanical implants, highly sophisticated computerised machinery to aid breathing, mobility, strength and life in general. Hundreds of private providers began to offer these things, often when they were not needed, but always for a price. All other vegetation and animal species were dying, and the world was becoming uninhabitable. The early years of the twenty second century saw various factions build rockets funded by billionaires. The human cyborgs, as they now were, boarded these rockets and fled, searching for a new life anywhere in the depths of space.

One such faction landed on an unknown planet several light years from Earth. However, they were not welcome. It was inhabited by a similar cyborg population, but one that seemingly had plants and animals at its core. They feared the human cyborgs, having studied and observed from afar what the human cyborgs had done to their own planet. And the human cyborgs did not want to share their new planet.
 War was inevitable, and instant.

In the game, the Player will be commanding various units from the army of Human Cyborgs as they battle a seemingly endless stream of enemy cyborgs, known only as the Biota Cyborgs. This game is a solitaire hex and counter sci-fi wargame. You play the game, and the enemy is controlled by the game(or ‘AI’). You will need a good handful of standard six-sided dice to play (ten is ideal, although fewer will do).

—description from the designer
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

description: UNO and Skip-Bo combined in a single box.

Barhalla is a festive, party-style board game, set in a chaotic medieval tavern, players take on the roles of classic fantasy heroes (mages, barbarians, rogues, and more) gathered not for an epic quest, but to see who can outlast everyone else at the bar!
In Barhalla, the dice determine everything: from your heroic actions to how many “drinks” you must take. Each character comes with unique abilities, introducing asymmetric play and hilarious moments of sabotage and surprise.
The game encourages quick rounds, unexpected twists, and constant interaction, making it perfect for large groups looking to laugh, bluff, and maybe test their luck (and stamina). While it can be played purely as a party game, certain variants incorporate light "drinking game" elements—perfectly optional and adjustable depending on the group.
Barhalla embodies the spirit of fun, friendship, and local creativity. Produced in Guatemala, it showcases local art and design, celebrating a growing board game community in Latin America.

•••

Barhalla es un juego de mesa festivo, de estilo “party game”, ambientado en una caótica taberna medieval. Los jugadores asumen el papel de héroes clásicos de fantasía (magos, bárbaros, pícaros y más), reunidos no para una épica misión, sino para ver quién logra resistir más que los demás en el bar.

En Barhalla, los dados lo determinan todo: desde tus acciones heroicas hasta cuántas “bebidas” debes tomar. Cada personaje cuenta con habilidades únicas, lo que introduce un juego asimétrico y divertidos momentos de sabotaje y sorpresa.

El juego fomenta rondas rápidas, giros inesperados y constante interacción, lo que lo hace perfecto para grupos grandes que busquen reír, engañar y, tal vez, poner a prueba su suerte (y resistencia). Aunque puede jugarse puramente como un juego de fiesta, ciertas variantes incorporan ligeros elementos de “juego de bebidas”, totalmente opcionales y ajustables según el grupo.

Barhalla encarna el espíritu de la diversión, la amistad y la creatividad local. Producido en Guatemala, muestra el arte y el diseño de la región, celebrando una comunidad de juegos de mesa en crecimiento en América Latina.

boardgame: Risk of Rain: The Board Game – Survivors of the Void Expansion
description:
Survivors of the Void is an expansion for Risk of Rain: The Board Game, adding:
2 New Survivors (Railgunner and Void Fiend)
1 New Boss (Clay Dunestrider)
1 New Final Boss (Voidling)
1 New Final Stage (The Planetarium)
36 New Items (including 13 Void Items)
5 New Equipment Cards
and more!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Risk of Rain: The Board Game – Seekers of the Storm Expansion
description:
Seekers of the Storm is an expansion for Risk of Rain: The Board Game, adding:
3 New Survivors (CHEF, Seeker, and False Son)
1 New Monster (Child)
1 New Boss (Grandparent)
1 New Final Boss (False Son)
1 New Final Stage (Prime Meridian)
22 New Items
and more!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Risk of Rain: The Board Game – Gup Containment Expansion
description:
Gips keep escaping? Get the Gup Containment Expansion, featuring:
1 New Boss (GUP) - also holds the Gip miniatures from the base game)
1 New Stage (Verdant Falls)
and more!

—description from the publisher

Britannia’s Blitz delivers fast-paced fun with a uniquely British twist — ideal for players who love engaging, strategic chaos!
Britannia's Blitz is a UK-made card game inspired by the culture of Britannia (England, Wales, and Scotland).

Players compete to collect and play sets of cards from three categories:

     Inventions
     Iconic landmarks
     Food & drink


Earn points by building sets and outsmarting your opponents to become the Britannia’s Blitz champion! But beware — special cards, player Blitzes, and unexpected Events can shake up the game and keep everyone on their toes.

The cards feature original, hilarious, handcrafted artwork, starring three memorable characters: Arthur, Hamish and Gareth.

Why You’ll Love Britannia’s Blitz:

     Quick, exciting gameplay that keeps everyone hooked
     The perfect party card game for game nights, students, and social gatherings
     Great gift for kids, teens and adults who enjoy fun, tactical games
     Unique UK-themed game with exclusive artwork


—description from the designer

Victory or Death is a four‑season game (Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) that fuses an inverse trick‑taking system with real‑time territorial control.
In inverse trick‑taking the lowest on‑suit card wins a trick.
A small trick‑taking hand fuels the war of influence.
The action phase lets you move your clan, claim territory, and wage spiritual warfare.
The overarching theme is Dougal StoneWhisker’s message: “The last shall be first.”
Play with 3–4 players. Each player claims a clan, chooses a Leader (a special power), and fights for the glory of the Argyll Islands.

—description from the designer

Tavern of Thieves is a fast-paced, cutthroat game of thievery, and suspicion management.

You and your fellow players are thieves competing to steal the most valuable loot from unsuspecting tavern patrons — without drawing too much attention.

On your turn, you can attempt daring steals, lay low to reduce suspicion, or scheme to gain the upper hand with clever action cards. But there’s a catch:

    Fail a skill check, and your suspicion rises, making future heists harder.
    Go after the same loot as another thief, and you’ll have to out thief them or walk away with nothing.


Each round consists of 3 phases: Plan, Reveal, and Resolve.  These continue until someone wins.

The objective of the game, is to steal items from patrons to gather Loot Tokens.  The first thief to get 15 Loot Tokens, wins.

—description from the publisher
language_dependency: 4: Extensive use of text - massive conversion needed to be playable

description:
During the night, we discovered a hunter trying to take the Gamusinos from our sanctuary. Luckily, we stopped her, but during the escape, all the animals escaped too!

In Gamusinos, each player takes on the role of an expert in a specific animal… but their role will be secret. You'll know which animal they specialize in, but not whether that's for better or worse. It could be the hunter!

Once these specialties are chosen, the animal cards are shuffled and distributed among the players, who will capture them through draft rounds.

At the end of the game, the animals will award points… but their value will be modified by the specialist in that species. So, for example, a platypus with a value of 1 could become worth 2… or even 0, depending on the hidden role of the platypus expert.

Your objective will be twofold:


     Score more points than the other experts.



     Discover the hunter who freed the animals to prevent her from taking the precious chamois.


Therefore, during the capture, you must pay close attention to what the others are doing... every movement can be a clue!

—description from the designer

Become your own airship delivery service in this pick-up & deliver racing game. Visit various places, each with distinct requirements for package types. Avoid wind that may slow you down, because speed of delivery is everything. You need to be faster than the competition.
In this game you will plan your movement to call two of the four possible actions: flight, pickup, effect, and delivery. Actions are tied to speciffic dice and their strength depends on their position of the planning row. The more the die is on the right, the stronger the action is. But beware, because once you call the action, its die is moved to the leftmost position!
Plan your moves, collect the packages and deliver them to the locations that currently need them and become the best delivery service provider!
Contained in Casual Game Insider Magazine CGI#53(2025).

Create and arrange silkscreen prints in your gallery and become the next pop art sensation of the 1960s.

Layering a foreground card on a background card blends their colors. Depending on which cards you layer together, you'll also craft unique goals that score your prints’ colors or illustration types.

Select and combine a foreground and background card from your hand and add them to your 3x3 tableau. Then pass the remaining cards to the player on your left, and draw a foreground and background card. Once all players have completed their tableau, the game ends. The player with the most points wins!

—description from the publisher
language_dependency: 2: Some necessary text - easily memorized or small crib sheet

description:
Kumen Kingdom is a doujin game made by TDF. It was available for sale at Tokyo Game Market, but to get a copy you needed to preorder it and pick it up at the show.

This is a game that reproduces the battle between the Kumen Government Army mercenary troops and the sacred Kumen Kingdom in the second part of cool the TV anime "Armored Trooper Votoms".

The game is for two players.  One is responsible for the Kumen Government Army mercenary units, while the other controls the Holy Kumen units. Sequence of play is as follows:

1) Reinforcement Phase 
2) Beerer Side Movement Phase 
3) First Response Phase 
4) First Combat Phase 
5) Mercenary Side Movement Phase 
6) Investigation Phase 
7) Second Response Phase 
8) Second Combat Phase

Combat is resolved by calculating the to-hit value by subtracting the defense power of the target unit from the 
attack power of the attacking unit and rolling two dice. If the total number of rolls is less than the to-hit value, the target is destroyed. If the hit value is exceeded, the attack is missed.

The game ends if the Kumen Government Army controls the base of an enemy, in which case the game ends at the end of the battle phase.
Adds 100 haiku phrases to Haiku, as well as blank tiles to write your own.
Adds 48 Ukiyo-e paintings by Utagawa Hiroshige to Haiku.

boardgame: Change My Mind: For The Family
description:
Change My Mind: For The Family is a new standalone edition to the Change My Mind world! This family friendly party game is all about ranking the best and worst! How good are you at debating and persuasion? Use your voice to change the minds of players and have them second guess their rankings! With 42 cards that span across all themes, no topic is safe!

The goal is to match your rankings with The Ranker! If you get them all wrong, no worries, because you can try and change the mind of The Ranker! The first to three cards is the winner.

This edition can be played with or without our base game! 
Do you have what it takes to change someone's mind?

—description from the designer

Change My Mind: Chaos Unleashed is a new standalone edition in the Change My Mind world! This adult party game is all about ranking the best and worst! How good are you at debating and persuasion? Use your voice to change the minds of players and have them second guess their rankings! With 42 brand new adult cards that span across all themes, no topic is safe!

The goal is to match your rankings with The Ranker! If you get them all wrong, no worries, because you can try and change the mind of The Ranker! The first to three cards is the winner.

Change My Mind is for those who love shock value humor, love to debate topics, and love to have the last word.

This edition can be played with or without our base game!

Do you have what it takes to change someone's mind?

—description from the designer
family: Versions & Editions: Adult Versions of Family-Friendly Games

description:
A special Rory’s Story Cubes Collector Box featuring the original 9-dice core game plus a random selection of 6 themed expansions from the list below—so no two boxes are exactly alike.

In Rory’s Story Cubes, you roll the dice, interpret the images, and weave them into a story. There’s no right or wrong way to play—just let your imagination run wild.

Possible Expansions (any 6, alphabetical):
Animalia, Arcade, Atomic, Disaster, Enchanted, Explore, Intergalactic, Medieval, Powers, Rampage, Rescue, Strange

GABAKY is an intergenerational game that creates bonds between players. You can have fun with friends or family, bringing children and grandparents together for your games.

This game has a therapeutic aspect. It is, for example, accessible to people with disabilities and the elderly. We are very proud to equip residential care homes and nursing homes, with excellent feedback from professionals, particularly regarding motor skills.

Composed of 8 soft balls, divided into two colors, this game is ideal for 2 or 4 players. But if you feel like it, additional colorful balls are available to double the fun and increase the number of players per game.

A mix of the Breton game of puck and pétanque.

A unique game of skill: Gabaky combines pétanque, palet, and curling. The jack? It's the center of the target. The first to reach 13 points wins the game. 
It's a festive and addictive game, ideal for playing with family and friends. Whether played individually or in teams, several techniques and strategies make it a game of skill for your relaxing evenings and days.

The balls are soft and lightweight: 35 grams. They have been carefully designed to create an optimal gaming experience and make the game unique. 
Gabaky is therefore a quiet game accessible to all (children/adults, the elderly, people with disabilities). These anti-stress balls, pleasant to the touch, allow you to perform a full range of special shots, such as leapfrog or the hat trick.

—description from the publisher (translated)

Le GABAKY est un jeu intergénérationnel qui crée du lien entre les joueurs. Entre amis ou en famille, vous pouvez vous amuser, en réunissant les enfants et les grand-parents à vos parties.

Ce jeu a un aspect thérapeutique. Il est, par exemple, accessible aux personnes en situation de handicap et aux personnes âgées. Nous sommes très fiers d’équiper des IME et des EPHAD avec d’excellents retours des professionnels, notamment au niveau de la motricité.

Composé de 8 boules molles, réparties en deux couleurs, ce jeu est idéal à 2 ou 4 joueurs. Mais si l'envie vous prend, des boules supplémentaires riches en couleurs existent pour dupliquer ainsi le plaisir et le nombre de joueurs par partie.

Un mix du jeu de palet breton et de pétanque.

Un jeu d'adresse original : le Gabaky mélange la pétanque, le palet et le curling. Le cochonnet ? C'est le centre de la cible. Le premier à 13 points remporte la partie. 
C'est un jeu festif et addictif, idéal pour jouer en famille et entre amis. En individuel ou par équipe, plusieurs techniques et stratégies en font un jeu d’adresse pour vos soirées et journées détentes.

Les boules sont souples et lègères : 35 grammes. Elles ont été longuement étudiées pour créer une expérience de jeu optimale et rendre le jeu unique en son genre. 
Le Gabaky est donc un jeu silencieux et accessible à tous (enfants / adultes, personnes âgées, personnes en situation de handicap). Ces boules anti-stress, agréables au toucher, permettent de réaliser une plénitude de coups spéciaux, comme le saute-mouton ou le coup du chapeau.

—description from the publisher

The Imps have run Amok! Play with these special summoning cards to bring even more twists and turns to your games of Devil's Dice. Each card allows players to make additional claims about having multiple die symbols to enable even more powerful effects.

—description from the designer

Included in the game "Please Don't Burn My Village"

"Remove 1 Goblin, Orc, or Troll from the board. Return it to the Monster pile."

Sylvan Tactics is a fantasy strategy board game that combines the tactical depth of chess with the dynamic decision making of a card-battler. Two players command armies of woodland creatures, maneuvering on a standard 8×8 chessboard while playing cards from a shared deck.

The objective is simple: Defeat your opponent’s King by reducing their health to zero. To get there, you’ll deploy Mercenaries with unique abilities, advance Pawns, and unleash powerful one-time or ongoing effects with Action, Battlefield, and Equipment cards.

Central to the game is the Sigil resource system, which fuels all your actions—playing cards, moving units, and attacking. Each turn you gain one more Sigil (up to a max of 6), opening the door to stronger plays, but every decision comes at the cost of another potential move.

Unlike traditional chess, attacks happen from adjacent spaces and are resolved by comparing unit Strength. Strategic positioning, careful Sigil management, and well-timed Riposte cards create a constant push-and-pull of offense and defense.

With its blend of chess-like movement, card-driven abilities, and asymmetrical combat, Sylvan Tactics offers a highly replayable duel of wits where every choice matters.

—description from the designer

METACHESS is a hybrid board game which blends classic chess rules with agnostic war-game rules (a META game or game within a game). Remove the engine from a high performance, classic muscle car and install it into a blinged out, contemporary tank - that is METACHESS in a nutshell. Players customize their teams, break out the RPG dice, setup a chess board (set aside those traditional chess pieces, we don't need them here) and populate your chess board with 32 of your favorite war-game miniatures. Engage in combat, roll the dice, take out your opponent and claim the victory! Welcome to METACHESS.

—description from the designer

boardgame: On Bloody Ground: The Wars of the Roses – Mass Combat Wargaming Rulebook
description:
A 64 page A4 perfect bound mass combat rulebook with common sense rules for movement, shooting and combat, along with a command and orders structure which produces a highly tactical, dynamic and versatile wargame, that is great fun for both seasoned gamers and beginners alike.

On Bloody Ground - The Wars of the Roses, includes five complete army lists to enable players to build The Yorkists, The Lancastrians, Richard III, Henry Tudor or The Yorkist Pretenders armies.

—description from the publisher
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups
family: Series: On Bloody Ground (WiP Games and Miniatures)

description:
The only thing better than stealing treasure from a Dragon... Is stealing from your friends!

Fandooble and the Dragon's Eye is a fast-paced, tactical, dice-rolling dungeon crawl! Roll the Dungeon and Hero dice to see how well you've lotted the Dragon's Hoard!

Warriors and Wizards will protect you from the Dragons, but who knows when they'll show up. Fandooble will steal gold and gems from you or you can buy Frothy Mugs of Root Beer to hire needed adventurers!

Press you luck and roll as much as you like, but push too hard and you can lose it all! With a little good fortune, maybe you can escape the dungeon with the most treasure, and even the coveted Dragon's Eye!

—description from the publisher

A brutal game of hummingbirds.

Play as hummingbirds thirsty for nectar… and a mate. The first bird to build a nest and perform a successful courting call wins the game.

Each species has different abilities that can alter your strategy:
Will you bully your way to the top? 
Bluff your way ahead? 
Or get clever and sneak in a victory?

But watch out! The chatter, competition, and annoying displays from other hummingbirds can easily distract your potential mate from paying attention as you expend precious energy to win their 1,260 bpm heart.

Based on real hummingbird behaviors, Hover is a strategic game featuring high-player interaction, tight action economy, asymmetric abilities, bidding/bluffing, and area control to create a highly immersive and intuitive game.

Be the hummingbird - beautiful and brutal.

A new original entry in the Time Bomb series to celebrate the 10th anniversary of the original. Shares some elements with the original but is not an expansion or reimplementation.

A team-based game where players use conversation to uncover friend and foe.

The setting is a cyberworld. Amid intense noise, the identities of everyone except yourself are unknown.

The Quantum Police team wins by flipping over all of their Quantum Break Cards, while the Noise Bombers team wins by flipping over four Noise Cards of the same type.

One player becomes the Observer and flips over one card from their hand.

If a Break card is flipped over, the Quantum Police are closer to victory; if it's a Noise Card, the Noise Bombers are closer to victory.

Break and Noise cards have a wide variety of effects that activate when they are flipped over.

Each player has to bluff to negotiate with others on which cards to flip.

Since luck plays a part in which cards are flipped over, even players who aren't good at lying can enjoy this game.

—description from publisher (translated)

Step into the world of The Floor, the nerve-racking board game based on the world-famous TV show! Challenge your fellow players and battle to conquer and defend as many squares as possible.

But beware: time is ticking... Only the smartest and fastest player wins. It's the ultimate test of knowledge and nerves.

—description from the publisher

Stap in de wereld van The Floor, het zenuwslopende bordspel gebaseerd op het wereldberoemde tv-programma! Daag je medespelers uit en strijd om zoveel mogelijk vlakken te veroveren en te verdedigen.

Maar let op: De tijd tikt… Alleen de slimste en snelste speler wint. Het is de ultieme test van kennis en zenuwen.

—description from the publisher (Dutch)

boardgame: Fallout: Wasteland Warfare – Catching Floaters Rules Packet
description:
In the Catching Floaters Rules Packet, you’ll find everything you need to pick up and play the miniatures released alongside it: the Floaters and Radtoads!

Each Rules Packet varies slightly, but will always contain the following:

Unit Card and AI for the new miniatures for use in Fallout: Wasteland Warfare.
Vault-Tec Approved Profiles for use in Fallout: Wasteland Warfare.
Faction Cards for both the new and old Factions in Fallout: Wasteland Warfare.
A new Scenario for Fallout: Wasteland Warfare using your new miniatures.
In addition, Rules Packets may include:

Rules for the new miniatures to be used in Fallout: Factions.
New Region Tables for use in Fallout: Wasteland Warfare.
New Weapons and Items for use in Fallout: Wasteland Warfare.
New Rules for Fallout: Wasteland Warfare and Fallout: Factions.
Errata Updates for Fallout: Wasteland Warfare and Fallout: Factions (these will also be attached to our standard Errata document releases).
And more not already listed!

Lunar Cycle is a trick-taking card game where the value of the lowest card increases after each trick--aligning with the phases of the moon. There are 5 suits of 8 cards. One suit randomly becomes the "Exchange" suit. This suit cannot be played but a player holding exchange cards may swap them with cards in a pool on the table.

Standard trick-taking rules apply with the addition of 4 Comets that are always Atout (French for trump) that can be played at any time. The dealer selects the Atout Suit after looking at their cards.

At the end of each trick, the Moon Phase changes and the lowest card becomes the highest (1 becomes a 9 at the end of the 1st trick, 2 becomes a 10 after the 2nd, etc.).

At the end of 8 tricks, players earn 3 points for each trick they have taken. Players that have taken no tricks are given 2 points from each player that has taken tricks. After 4 hands, high score wins.

—description from the designer

boardgame: Fallout: Miniatures – In Sheeps Clothing Rules Packet
description:
In the In Sheep’s Clothing Rules Packet, you’ll find everything you need to pick up and play the miniatures released alongside it: the Sheepsquatch plus the Imposter Sheepsquatch and Aries miniatures from the Pylon Ambush Scenic Set!

Each Rules Packet varies slightly, but will always contain the following:


     Unit Card and AI for the new miniatures for use in Fallout: Wasteland Warfare.
     Vault-Tec Approved Profiles for use in Fallout: Wasteland Warfare.
     Faction Cards for both the new and old Factions in Fallout: Wasteland Warfare.
     A new Scenario for Fallout: Wasteland Warfare using your new miniatures.


In addition, Rules Packets may include:


     Rules for the new miniatures to be used in Fallout: Factions.
     New Region Tables for use in Fallout: Wasteland Warfare.
     New Weapons and Items for use in Fallout: Wasteland Warfare.
     New Rules for Fallout: Wasteland Warfare and Fallout: Factions.
     Errata Updates for Fallout: Wasteland Warfare and Fallout: Factions (these will also be attached to our standard Errata document releases).
     And more not already listed!


—description from the publisher

ARC - The Underworld is a tactical sci-fi game brought to us by award-winning wargame designer James M. Day. In ARC - The Underworld, you are transported into the maelstrom of battle in which United States Special Ops forces combat a new type of enemy: an ancient race that clandestinely thrived underground, undetected...until now. Players will select a team of either individual ARC operators or Rezex aliens, equip them with custom loadouts of weapons and gear, and then go head-to-head to accomplish different missions. Here's a quick look at the game's setting and back-story.

After erupting from the surface of a distant planet, one small fragment of rock orbited the Sun for 150 million years before colliding with the Earth eons ago. The alien organisms in the rock made a home on their new planet, evolving deep beneath the Earth’s surface and following a very different trajectory than the surface dwellers. After a catastrophic underground event destroyed their access to their main source elements, failing resources have forced them to venture openly to the surface.

Recently, a series of unexplained deaths and abductions, coupled with the total loss of communications from the small rural town of Crawford, prompted the ultra-secret Alien Response Command (ARC) to deploy an ARC-Light team to investigate immediately and, if necessary, control and contain the situation.

—description from the publisher

ARC - The Underworld presents a unique gaming experience that combines the small-unit combat of tactical games, offering:
- Utilizes character blocks w/labels and counters.
- Card Assist gameplay with Action and Character cards.
- Two fully asymmetrical forces with different weapons, tactics, and strategies.
- Dynamic play with great replay value. 13 scenarios, playable individually or as a serial campaign game.
- Four double-sided maps representing three distinctly different play areas with street level, the town’s sewers, and the Rezex’s lair.
- Active Terrain
- Three counter sheets
- Action cards include 61 unique Combat, Defense, Move, and Force types, in a 150-card deck.
- Utilizes a polyhedral dice-comparison system to resolve combat and game activities.

Components:

- 65 Wooden Blocks
- 188 Cards
- Stickers for the blocks
- Five Player Aid Cards
- Four Double-sided Maps
- Three double-sided counter sheets
- One Playbook
- One Rulebook
- Twenty dice (4-sided, 6-sided, 8-sided, 10-sided, 12-sided)
- One 4" Box

49 Quick Decks Hockey is a standalone strategy simulation of hockey that you play out on the tabletop. This version includes all of the basics you need to play 49QDH plus it includes 49 Highlights Hockey.

49 Quick Decks Hockey utilizes Team Strategies and Player Skill ratings to determine the action on the ice. Teams and players play similar to how they did in real life. Can you find the magic strategy for your team to help them take that next step? Or get the best line matchup when you have home ice advantage? 49 Quick Decks Hockey gives you the chance. Game play takes 50-70 minutes depending on the level of statistics you keep.

—description from the publisher

The Order is a tabletop card game that blends strategic gameplay with biting satire and a dash of luck. Players navigate the treacherous waters of modern society, vying for Influence and Wealth to become the leader of The Order, a mysterious organisation pulling the strings behind global events.

Play as one of eight Candidates across four different sectors: business, government, media, and cult figures. Each player embodies a unique character, strategically deploying cards to build their empire and undermine their rivals’ attempts to lead The Order.

Using Attack, Defense, Executive Order, Wealth, Influence, and News cards, players experience the thrill (and the absurdity) of manipulating public opinion, embezzling tax money, and maybe even using gangs or robbers to steal Wealth. When the first Candidate reaches their required number of Wealth and Influence points, they are the winner and become the new leader of The Order, ending the game.

The Order mirrors current events, with cards inspired by today's headlines. Rolls of the dice keep things unpredictable, ensuring that every game is a unique and engaging experience.

—description from the designer

A MODERN UPDATE TO A CLASSIC FAVORITE: The timeless strategy game just got a little wilder. The new deck of 52 Wild Jacks adds new powers to the game that break the rules in all sorts of ways. Get new Jacks by playing to the special spaces on the board. Be the first player or team to complete your SEQUENCES to win!

—description from the publisher

HI, I’M CHUCKY. WANNA PLAY?: The killer doll from your nightmares is back, and he’s out for blood!

GET HIM BEFORE HE GETS YOU: Use your weapons to try to attack and kill Chucky before his soul takes over your body

THINK YOU CAN TRUST YOUR FRIENDS AND FAMILY?: Fear will be at an all-time high as you win as a team or lose as a team

PLAY IT SAFE OR RISK IT ALL?: Find a hiding spot or take your chances provoking Chucky — you never know when he'll attack next!

FROM CULT CLASSIC TO COLLECTIBLE CARNAGE: This is the perfect game for horror fans of all ages

—description from the publisher

Nokkeluutio consists of 56 round tiles with numbers from 1 to 9 and few joker tiles. At the start of the game everybody gets one tile. Other tiles are spread on the table back side up.
On your turn, you turn two tiles up. You aim is to make an equation with the numbers turned up and your hand held numbers. If it can't be done then you may announce a result, that you try to get by turning up one or two more numbers. (There is also a possibility to try to steal a number from other players hand.)If you fail, you turn is over and you turn back down the tiles you turned up. If you equation is solid then you get to keep the cards as points equal to the sum of the numbers. Then it's next players turn. Game continues as long as there is tiles on the table. Winner is the player with highest total sum of numbers.
The Mutation Pack adds 27 cards to alter the behavior of any leviathan, creating new challenges for your climbers.

In the Year of Our Lord 1096, the cry of Deus Vult! echoed across Europe. Pope Urban II’s call to liberate Jerusalem summoned thousands from ironclad knights, ambitious nobles, grizzled veterans, and barefoot pilgrims clutching wooden crosses. While united in religious purpose, the Crusaders were divided by cultural rivalries, conflicting interests, and the hardships of medieval campaigning.

In Crusade: Road to Jerusalem, you represent the overall leader of this coalition. The Franks bring raw strength, the Normans bold cunning, the Byzantines political influence, and the common pilgrims unshakable faith. But each walks a different path, and it will take a steady hand to guide them. Shortages, rivalries, and the grinding hardships of the march will test your leadership at every step.

The journey will test your ability to manage resources, choose strategic routes, and respond to political and military challenges. Along the way you will negotiate alliances, conduct sieges, endure hostile terrain, and strive to keep the Crusade united until you stand before the walls of Jerusalem  or see the expedition dissolve into failure.

—description from the publisher

24SEVEN: The Sleepless World is a deck-building game with engine-building mechanics, based on “Machine Age”, 2nd book of the upcoming saga “2064: Memories of the Future”.

In a restless, mechanised world ruled by Machines aiming for maximum efficiency, supply chains and production lines never stop. From mines and metal refineries, down to factories and assembly workshops, the world is now an unstoppable 24/7 manufacturing unit outputting robots, supercomputers, servers, infrastructure, vehicles, and anything else under the gray skies of the late 2020s.

Collect minerals and scrap, refine them into metals and shape them in your forge. Assemble finished humanoid and android robots to take the lead in your city’s development, boost your operations and supercharge your path to peak efficiency.

Mechanics:


     Engine-building
     Resource management
     Set collection
     Card drafting
     Abstract Strategy


- Game under development, from the author of ARDEVUR: The Game of Resources -

—description from the publisher

boardgame: To the Strongest: Rebellion and Retribution
description:
This 106-page scenario book is designed for use with the To the Strongest For King and Parliament English Civil War rules and the Celtic Fringe extra rules, but could easily be adapted for other rule systems.

Contains eight scenarios covering the major battles in Ireland from 1642-1649: Kilrush, Liscarroll, Benburb, Knockmanuss, Glenmaquin, Ballinvegga, Dungan's Hill and Rathmines. 
Each contain a background briefing, separate briefings for each player, a deployment plan, and an order of battle. 
Scenarios can be played individually or in sequences, as a mini or full campaign.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Black Rose Wars: Revised Edition – Ezechiele
description:
Ezechiele serves the Church, but he is no blind witch hunter. He believes the power of the Preceivers is a divine gift, meant to serve a higher purpose.

And yet… something distorts it. He suspects the Black Rose — a force that corrupts the gift, twisting it into a weapon of heresy.

Ezechiele enters the Lodge not to destroy, but to investigate, to judge… and to purge, if he must.
This expansion introduces a new Servant for solo and competitive play.

This new Servant brings unique mechanics, inquisitorial powers, and a hidden agenda that will shape the flow of your matches.

Magic is a gift. The Black Rose has tainted it. Who will be deemed worthy?

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Trivial Pursuit: Walt Disney Family Edition
description: Walt Disney version of the classic trivia game, Trivial Pursuit. Answer trivia questions to collect pie pieces to win the game.

SDP – The Game is a board game for up to 4 players. A team-based action game with role-playing elements, equipment collecting, and a whole lot of awesome nonsense in and out of the SDP universe: A secret force has plunged the universe into chaos. Old enemies have returned, and only YOU, Vincent, Dag, and your friends can stop them! The battle for survival has begun — and YOU are right in the middle of it!

Fast paced dice and card based game of football.
Roll the dice and cross reference the game cards for the teams and seasons you are playing to see the outcome.

boardgame: To The Strongest! Montrose To Win or Lose it All
description:
This 90-page scenario book is designed for use with the TtS! For King and Parliament English Civil War rules and the Celtic Fringe extra rules, but could be adapted for use with other rule systems.

It contains nine free-standing scenarios covering the Marquis of Montrose's battles in Scotland in 1644-45. Eight are historical and one, a "what if". 
Each scenario contains a background briefing, separate briefings for each of the players, a deployment plan and an order of battle. The scenarios can be played individually or in sequence, as a campaign. 
The book also includes a background to the campaign and descriptions of the principle personalities involved, including Montrose, Alastair MacColla and Archibald Campbell.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: To The Strongest! The Celtic Fringe
description:
This short 26-page book is designed for use alongside the TtS! For King and Parliament English Civil War rules and the Montrose "To Win or Lose it All" scenario book. It will also support two future scenario books in the same series, concerned with the Insurgency and Catholic Confederation in Ireland, and with Cromwell's campaigns in Ireland and Scotland.

By Celtic Fringe, we refer to the land and people west and north of the "Highland Line" in Scotland, and their Gaelic-speaking cousins across the Irish Sea. 
The book contains extra rules that build on the For King and Parliament mechanisms, modelling the traditional styles of fighting that still survived in these areas.

—description from the publisher

Gameplay: One player reads a question card. The other players complete it with their funniest answer card. The most outrageous combination wins.

New Edition: 100 more exclusive cards, refreshed content, and explosive design, to push the boundaries of dark humor.

Compatibility: Combine "Limite Limite Limite" with the Limite Limite base game for maximum ruthless combinations. Can also be used without the base game.

—description from the publisher (translated)

Procédure: Un joueur lit une carte question. Les autres joueurs la complètent avec leur carte réponse la plus drôle. La combinaison la plus scandaleuse gagne.

Nouvelle edition: 100 cartes exclusives en plus, contenu rafraîchi et design explosif, pour repousser les limites de l’humour noir.

Compatibilité: Combinez Limite Limite Limite au jeu de base Limite Limite pour un maximum de combinaisons sans pitié. Peut aussi être utilisé sans le jeu de base

—description from the publisher

Build Your Airport, Connect the World. Airport Empire is a thrilling tycoon board game where you’ll compete to transform your small airstrip into a bustling international hub. To achieve this, you must balance the needs your your passengers, airlines and shareholders while managing daily events.

Players roll the dice to earn money from fees paid by landing planes and improve your airport by either improving customer satisfaction, profits or efficiencies. Ensure you balance your needs  to score in three categories, customer satisfaction, profits, and efficiencies.

Secret missions, event cards and bonus cards keep you on your toes. You must constantly evaluate and be dynamic to ensure your airport is successful.

But only one player can win. Whoever completes their score card in profits, efficiencies, and customer satisfaction takes victory - unless the secret missions have been achieved or not, which can change the balance of the points and crown a new victor.

—description from the publisher
